**IDENTIFYING COMMUNITY NEEDS**  
- IDENTIFYING COMMUNITY NEEDS-CONNECTIONS BETWEEN GROUPS AND INDIVIDUALS ARE CRITICAL FOR EFFECTIVE BUILDING  
- IDENTIFYING COMMUNITY NEEDS-UNDERSTANDING LOCAL PROBLEMS AND PREFERENCES HELP FOSTER RELEVANCE AND ENGAGEMENT  

### BUILDING TRUST AND RELATIONSHIPS  
- BUILDING TRUST AND RELATIONSHIPS-CONNECTIONS ARE BASED ON RELIABILITY AND RESPECT  
- BUILDING TRUST AND RELATIONSHIPS-OPENING CHANNELS FOR COMMUNICATION AND SUPPORT ENHANCES FELICTION AND INCLUSION  

### FOSTERING INCLUSIVE GROWTH  
- FOSTERING INCLUSIVE GROWTH-ENCOURAGING PARTICIPATION FROM ALL GROUPS PROMOTES DIVERSITY AND COHESION  
- FOSTERING INCLUSIVE GROWTH-PROVIDING EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES AND SUPPORT ENHANCES COMMUNITY STABILITY AND DEVELOPMENT
